contradictions.claim_text: The legacy claim 'ECFMG now requires OET only and has dropped IELTS' is not safe to publish because official ECFMG materials still recognize a valid former Step 2 CS route alongside the OET Pathway route.
contradictions.conflict_summary: Official ECFMG materials say OET Medicine is only one Pathway requirement and separately preserve a valid former Step 2 CS route, so the 'OET only' framing is false. The rerun also found no official source that supports the added 'dropped IELTS' wording.
contradictions.resolution: Do not publish the compound 'OET only / dropped IELTS' claim. Keep ECFMG route language narrow: OET Medicine is required for Pathways applicants, but it is not the only route stated in the current official materials reviewed.
